name: Function Call With Incorrect Variable or Reference as Argument
description: The product calls a function but specifies an incorrect variable or reference as an argument, typically due to programmer typos or copy-paste mistakes. This can cause the function to operate on unintended data, leading to undefined behavior.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[function_call] node passes an incorrect STORAGE[variable] reference to TRANSFORM[callee] or EXTERNAL node, where the wrong variable is used in place of the intended one due to naming similarity or scope confusion
